svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/28.0.6 Chrome/138.0.7204.100 Electron/37.2.3 Safari/537.36" version="28.0.6" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="modulith-migration" name="Extraction"> <mxGraphModel dx="1426" dy="841" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="mod_container" value="Modulith (Monolithic Base)" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;fontStyle=1;strokeColor=#666666;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="80" y="80" width="300" height="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mod_a" value="module a<br>(order)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" parent="mod_container" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="30" y="50" width="110" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mod_b" value="module b<br>(customer)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" parent="mod_container" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="160" y="50" width="110" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mod_c_legacy" value="module c<br>(payment)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;dashed=1;" parent="mod_container" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="95" y="160" width="110" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ms_c" value="<b>microservice c</b><br>(payment service)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="520" y="230" width="150" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow_extract" value="&nbsp;extract / scale&nbsp;" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=3;strokeColor=#FF3333;fontColor=#FF3333;" parent="1" source="mod_c_legacy" target="ms_c" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="comm_link" value="&nbsp;API / events&nbsp;" style="edgeStyle=none;rounded=0;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;dashed=1;strokeColor=#666666;" parent="1" source="mod_a" target="ms_c" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="165" y="210" /> <mxPoint x="595" y="210" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="db_main" value="main DB" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=15;fillColor=#f5f5f5;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="195" y="400" width="70" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="db_ms" value="service DB" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=15;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="560" y="400" width="70" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="link_db1" value="" style="endArrow=none;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" parent="1" source="mod_container" target="db_main" edge="1"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="link_db2" value="" style="endArrow=none;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" parent="1" source="ms_c" target="db_ms" edge="1"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
